message:
✨ Integrate EPG programme info into channel list with inline guide view (#4)

- Show now-playing EPG title in each channel row (purple accent)
- Extend search to match against EPG programme titles
- Add guide view toggle button (replaces guide nav button)
- Build inline guide view with time ruler and programme blocks
- Auto-scroll guide to current time on open
- Highlight currently airing programmes

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
